note: Native gentle-ai review CAS tooling incompatible with this flow (same limitation recorded by the point-in-time-market-context archive); ledger persisted directly from the four lens sweeps.

findings.claim: Stage-0 history gate omitted the MISSING_DATA (zero-volume) and DOMAIN_INVARIANT_VIOLATION (invalid OHLC) guards documented in design.md Data Flow and enforced by the sibling MomentumScanner, letting corrupt bars silently reach ranking/proximity/trend math.

fix.green_evidence: uv run --extra dev pytest -q -> 241 passed, 3 skipped; ruff clean

findings.claim: Rejected ScanDecisions (all five scanner rejection reasons) are discarded with no counter, journal entry, or report field, so a scanner regression is indistinguishable from a quiet market in backtest output.
Duplicate-date/non-monotonic bar defense exists only at the JsonFixtureReader boundary; callers of ScannerPort with unvalidated bars (e.g. fetch_range pagination) can silently corrupt window math.
Cross-sectional rank pool can mix candidates with different candidate dates (bar gaps) and no spec text or test defines the intended ranking behavior for that case.
The only mixed-date cross-section test asserts membership/ordering but never accepted/reason, so it is mutation-blind on the ranking outcome it constructs.
BacktestRun._simulate_trade is dead code duplicating _exit_for_bar exit logic (pre-existing; already recorded by two archived reviews).
Metrics and segment metrics are computed twice with identical inputs; the values stored on BacktestResult are discarded by the CLI report (pre-existing pattern).
HISTORY_DAYS = 253 depends exactly on MOMENTUM_FAR_DAYS + 1 but the coupling is documented only in design.md, not at the constants.
Explicit empty result: the risk sweep found no findings (CLI allow-list fail-closed; execution/broker path unreachable from the new code; domain purity verified).
